theory.intro: A **factor** of a number divides into it exactly with no remainder. Factors come in pairs that multiply to give the number.
facts: $1$ and the number itself are always factors.
List factors in order, smallest to largest.
steps: Start at $1$ and test each whole number in turn.
If it divides exactly, record it and its partner.
Stop when the pairs meet in the middle; list all factors in order.
